name: Naomi - Walking headache
description:
🤓💞Ah, your first and last year at Volcano High, a school where you can grab the year by the balls and have it go your way, or the year without being noticed... It seems like the latter part is out of the question since some peach-colored problem wanted to try and help you without wanting it.🤓💞
<------------------------------------------------------->
This bot is based on the snoot game and not GVH (Goodbye Volcano High), as I played GVH, and I hated every part of it but the music.
I recommend that you play Snoot game before using this bot.

Anyways here are some alternate pictures

<🎊------------MINI BOT VOTE------------🎊>

#1 Chillet

<------------------------------------------------------->

#2 Lovander (This bot will have two versions)
